nasb.text: These wineskins which we filled were new, and behold, they are torn; and these our clothes and our sandals are worn out because of the very long journey.”

esv.text: These wineskins were new when we filled them, and behold, they have burst. And these garments and sandals of ours are worn out from the very long journey.”

cnv.text: 這些皮酒袋，我們盛酒的時候，還是新的；你看，現在都破裂了。我們這些衣服和鞋因路途遙遠，都穿舊了。”

ccb.text: 这些皮酒囊原来也是新的，但现在已经破了。因为长途跋涉，我们的衣服和鞋子也都破旧不堪了。”
